meta.title: ROGS Safety Authorisation — application pack (for submission)
meta.subtitle: Route resolved · references the SMS · ROGS/ORR application elements
meta.author: HSE Rail
meta.classification: Internal — for submission to ORR / competent-person review required
meta.deid_notice: All personnel are referred to by role label (accountable duty-holder, safety-critical roles, COSS). Identifiers and any Sentinel numbers were pseudonymised before drafting; the re-identification key is held separately and is not part of this document. This application is assembled FOR submission to ORR; granting the authorisation is the Safety Authority's act and is not asserted here.

sections.text: This application pack is assembled to the ROGS 2006 (SI 2006/599) requirements for the named dutyholder. The dutyholder route is resolved first and held throughout: an infrastructure manager applies for a safety authorisation, a mainline transport operator for a safety certificate, and a non-mainline operation for a ROGS Part 3 safety verification. It is assembled FOR submission to ORR — it does not assert authorisation by ORR.

metrics.label: Open [GAP]s
metrics.caption: each closed by a SMART action

sections.text: This application REFERENCES the dutyholder's existing rail Safety Management System (built via rail-safety-management-system, RAIL-01) as an input — it does NOT rebuild the SMS element set. If the SMS does not exist, build it via RAIL-01 first.
[GAP — the reference/version of the existing SMS and the operation scope this application covers; referenced, not reproduced]
3. Risk-control summary (hierarchy of controls applied — SFAIRP)

rows.title: [GAP — the operation's significant risk, drawn from the SMS]
rows.description: [GAP — the controlled risk and its arrangement, summarised from the SMS]

rows.control: [GAP — eliminate the hazard where reasonably practicable]

items: Significance test (safety relevance / novelty / complexity / monitoring / reversibility / additionality) — Reg (EU) 402/2013 (KB-REG-CSM-RA)
Risk-acceptance principle applied: codes of practice / reference systems / explicit risk estimation [GAP]
Independent AsBo (Assessment Body) for significant changes [GAP]

sections.caption: Accountabilities — role / accountability / status (named individuals de-identified to role labels)

sections.text: [GAP — the dutyholder declaration and the submission package for ORR]

rows.action: [GAP — SMART action closing each open application element]

sections.text: This application is assembled FOR submission to ORR. ORR is the Safety Authority; granting the authorisation is its act and is not asserted in this document.

items: Railways and Other Guided Transport Systems (Safety) Regulations 2006 (SI 2006/599) — KB-REG-ROGS
Common Safety Method for Risk Evaluation and Assessment, Reg (EU) 402/2013 (retained EU law in GB) — KB-REG-CSM-RA
India: Railways Act 1989 / Commissioner of Railway Safety — KB-REG-IN-RAIL (state detection mandatory; no national form invented)
